titleStmt.title: SII 35.29: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 29. (A.R. No. 64 of 1952-53.) SAVAṆŪR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab buried near the Nawab's bungalow outside the village.
This fragmentary inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 12, Prabhava, Jyēshṭha Paurṇima corresponding to A.D. 1087, May 20.

It states that two hundred Mahājanas of the agrahāra of Savaṇūr conferred together and selected Madhusūdana or Maddiga of the Pārāśara-gōtra and Vājivaṁsa, as the protector of the frontier town of Savaṇūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastasmaisudhāsūti śēkharāyasurāpagā yāti māyati svasti sama
stabhuvanāśraya śrīpritvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya kuḷatikaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā caṁdrārkātāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānajapasamādhiśīlasaṁpannarappa śrī mahagrahāraṁ
savaṇūramahājanavinnūrvvaramahānubhāvamadeṁteṁdaḍe . vṛtta . vinutāṣṭādaśadharmaśāstra sa nēka
rtthaśāstra caturvvēdavinōdigaḷu pṛthitācārādidyarekṛtāpuśaya dvadamudvipadvi paṁcānana dvija
na pravaryya naḷareṁba kīrttisavaṇūrinnuṁrvvaroḷsārtthakaṁ © Aṁtenisida mahājanavinnūrvvaru śrī mā
ccāḷukya vikramakālada 12 neya prabhavasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭada paurṇamāsiyaṁdu namma grāmavaṁ
rakṣisal dakṣanuṁ samartthanumāvanakkumendāḷōcisi . v® . guṇagaṇajanmabhūmi vinayāṁrvvara saṁkuḷa
janudbhaṭāgraṇi sujanabrajārppitanijaga samastadanasadōnatappaṇi śucisatyasandanacaḷōpamadhai
ryyanavāryyavīryaneṁboṇikegaḷuṁbamādaguṇadiṁ sūdananurvvarōttamaṁ . gōtra pārāśara
ccaritagulli kaccābye tāṁ patratāybhāritrāṇaṁ śrīdhavayya janakanamaḷina vājivaṁśābjirājīva mitra
vāvarṇnanaṇnaguṇagaṇanidhitammaṁ mahādēvanāgal dhātrībhāgadoḷ maddiganadhikataraṁ puṇyapuṁjakṛtā
rtthaṁ . va . Aṁtenisida madhusūdananaṁ nōḍi . Idu sīmāgrāmamī perjjida pama deyyādāvinā
ca mattāvaneṁdāsabheya vekuḷḷiḻdana tta peccidadāsedrēkadina maṁdyatarucinisesedalesani
yendi dūdāna śrīmadinnūrvvaraparakeyanutsāhadiṁ maddigāṁkaṁ . paḍedinnūrvvarumēkamatyade
sal maddiyalladana ṟusalaneṁdu savivāraṁgrāma saṁrakṣaṇārtthadinā
Digital edition of SII 35.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
